articles.title: FORECAST: Heat advisory issued for Tuesday, Wednesday - WFSB
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Andaman and Nicobar Islands
articles.full_text:
Updated: 8 hours ago
Meteorologist Tyler Hughes looks ahead to a hot and humid week with a potential for isolated showers Monday evening.
Updated: 13 hours ago
Meteorologist Tyler Hughes looks ahead to a hot and humid week with a potential for isolated showers Monday evening.
Updated: Jul. 12, 2026 at 6:15 AM EDT
Meteorologist Jill Gilardi said high pressure continues to build in across the region, leading to plenty of sunshine and seasonable warmth. Temperatures will be perhaps a degree or two warmer, but humidity remains low.
Updated: Jul. 11, 2026 at 7:14 PM EDT
Meteorologist Tyler Hughes said tonight is a perfect night for the communities having fireworks displays! Here's his Saturday 7 p.m. forecast.
Updated: Jul. 11, 2026 at 2:47 PM EDT
|Meteorologist Jill Gilardi said it will be a refreshing weekend with less humidity. For today, with the front washing out as it lingers offshore, we’ll likely see more clouds than sunshine through the afternoon.
